description_long: This car store is a single-story commercial building with a flat, dark roof and a rectangular footprint. The facade features large glass windows at the entrance, allowing visibility into the showroom area. The exterior includes a parking lot with marked spaces and several cars of various colors, as well as a drive-through lane and outdoor seating with round red tables and chairs. The building is primarily finished in light gray and white, with red accent elements such as signage and barriers. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete and glass, with metal and plastic components for doors, windows, and fixtures. The overall design is clean and modern, with functional outdoor areas for both vehicles and customers.
description: A modern, single-story car store with a flat roof, glass entrance, parking lot, and red-accented outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass entrance, parking lot with cars, and outdoor seating with red tables.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's length, additional parking spaces, and a drive-through lane.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back parking area, service entrance, and more outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the red-accented facade, glass entrance, and arrangement of outdoor tables.
attribute_signage: Red rectangular signage above the main entrance and on the facade, non-illuminated, with no visible text or branding.
attribute_displayed_cars: Six cars visible in the parking lot and drive-through: two blue, two red, one white, one yellow; makes and models not discernible.
attribute_glass_facade: Large glass panels at the main entrance, framed and extending across the front facade.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern with minimalist elements, flat roof, clean lines, and prominent glass entrance.
